message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
}

actor User
participant Frontend
participant Backend
database Database

group Login
  User -> Frontend : Presses the "Login"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to open new window
  Backend --> Frontend : Opens new window
  User -> Frontend : Enters login information
  User -> Frontend : Presses "Confirm"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to validate input
  Backend -> Database : Validates login input

  alt [Successful case]
    Database --> Backend : Validation successful
    Backend -> Frontend : Allows user to proceed
    Frontend --> User : Proceeds to next window
  else [Validation failed]
    Database -x Backend : Validation failed
    Backend -> Frontend : Displays alert of type ERROR
    Frontend -> User : Lists up fields with errors
  end
end

group Cancel
  User -> Frontend : Presses the "Cancel"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to close process
  Backend --> Frontend : Closes window
end
@enduml
